info.name: GraphQL – LinkedIn Module
info.description: LinkedIn: search, upsertByLinkedInUrl (mutations only; no queries under root linkedin). 1 credit per URL. Variables: use camelCase. See sql/apis/21_LINKEDIN_MODULE.md (Mutations – parameters and variable types).

body.raw: {"query":"mutation SearchLinkedIn($input: LinkedInSearchInput!) { linkedin { search(input: $input) { contacts { contact { uuid firstName lastName email } } companies { company { uuid name } } totalContacts totalCompanies } } }","variables":{"input":{"url":"https://www.linkedin.com/in/johndoe"}}

body: query":"mutation LinkedInExport($input: LinkedInExportInput!) { linkedin { export(input: $input) { totalUrls contactExport { jobId } companyExport { jobId } } } }","variables":{"input":{"urls":["https://www.linkedin.com/in/johndoe"]}}
